channel.title: Earl Grey Latte on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Earl Grey Latte on Barista At Home

item.title: London Fog Latte Recipe (Hot & Iced) — Earl Grey Tea Latte
item.description: Make a London Fog Latte at home — the creamy Earl Grey tea latte with vanilla and steamed milk. Includes Starbucks copycat ratios and an iced version.
